title: Performance, Capacity, and Resource Boundaries
objective: Characterize Enki performance and resource behavior under governed synthetic workloads, publish explicit budgets and limits, and reject unsupported production-scale claims.
exit_criteria: Repeatable benchmarks cover transactions, state writes, reconciliation, transitions, model use, reconstruction, and export/import
Latency, throughput, memory, storage growth, and recovery cost are reported by workload size
Performance budgets and overload behavior are explicit and machine-tested
Benchmarks preserve TEST isolation and contain no private or production data
No benchmark result is represented as a production capacity guarantee

evidence.description: Implemented governed synthetic benchmarks, explicit TEST budgets, overload denial, report hashing, and production-claim prevention across all required operation families.
Merged the Sprint 15 implementation into sandbox.
CI passed the benchmark suite, budget, overload, data-classification, reporting, and claim-boundary tests.
Runtime Coverage passed across every declared Sprint 15 performance path.
Work Control Authority passed before completion promotion.
